name: Soup-er Snack Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop the corn and remove the unpopped kernels.
2. Spread the popcorn in a large baking pan.
3. Sprinkle the nuts over the popcorn.
4. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat until it coats the pan.
5. Add brown sugar and corn syrup to the melted butter, cooking for 4-5 minutes or until boiling.
6. Stir in baking soda and vanilla.
7. Pour the mixture evenly over the popcorn and nuts, stirring to coat everything thoroughly.
8. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 10 minutes, then stir and bake an additional 10 minutes more.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving or storing.
